title: stylidium velleioides
intro: Stylidium velleioides, also known as the trigger plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stylidiaceae. It is native to Western Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stylidium velleioides include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications for skin conditions.
